---
name: Documentation
about: Request documentation improvements
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation,triage
assignees: ''
---

## 📚 Documentation Request
What aspect of the project needs better documentation?

## 📍 Specific Area
- **Which files/functions/components need documentation?**
- **What concepts need explanation?**
- **What is missing or unclear?**

## 📝 Proposed Content
Describe what documentation should be added or improved:

### Type of Documentation
- [ ] User guide
- [ ] API reference
- [ ] Tutorial
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Architecture documentation
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide
- [ ] Other:

### Target Audience
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] System administrators

## 🔗 References
Link to relevant code, issues, or external resources:

- **Source Code:**
- **Related Issues:**
- **Current Documentation:**
- **Reference Materials:**

## 📋 Current State
Describe the current state of documentation:
- What exists now
- What's missing or unclear
- What needs updating

## ✅ Success Criteria
What would make this documentation request complete?
- [ ] All key concepts explained
- [ ] Code examples provided
- [ ] Diagrams/illustrations included
- [ ] Troubleshooting scenarios covered
- [ ] Links to related resources

## 💬 Additional Context
Add any other context about the documentation request:

## 🤝 Contribution Interest
- [ ] I would like to write this documentation
- [ ] I can provide examples and use cases
- [ ] I am available for review and feedback
